_comment: Suzaku Tomb — underground tomb containing the Cultivation Planet Crystal. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L52): A multi-floor tomb within Planet Suzaku containing the Cultivation Planet Crystal (the seal-mechanism of the planet itself). Wang Lin found the Half-Moon Blade here. Also where the scattered demon Piao Nanzi/Lou Hou was sealed. Dark, enclosed, tomb-like atmosphere. The tomb's existence is the reason Planet Suzaku is sealed — the Crystal is the seal anchor. Prime Directive: the tomb and Crystal existed long before Wang Lin; they are the reason the planet is sealed, not the other way around.
